subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-29 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Today, the friends of God are the illuminated candles of the world of humanity
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual transformation, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
